summary: Affiliate/Influencer system fully tested and verified. All backend APIs work correctly (POST /api/influencers, GET /api/admin/influencers, PUT /api/influencers/{id}, POST /api/affiliate/click, GET /api/influencer/stats, GET /api/admin/conversions). Admin panel Affiliation tab renders with influencer cards, stats, and create form. VIP page correctly captures ref= query parameter. Influencer dashboard shows appropriate error for non-influencer users.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Affiliate endpoints properly secured - POST /api/influencers requires admin auth (401/403 for unauthenticated)
Backend: Click tracking endpoint POST /api/affiliate/click is correctly public (no auth required)
Backend: Default commission rate is 20% (0.20), correctly applied when not specified
Frontend: VIP page /vip?ref=CODE correctly captures ref code into localStorage via AsyncStorage at lines 67-73
Frontend: Admin panel Affiliation tab renders correctly with influencer cards showing name, email, code, clicks, conversions, commission rate
Frontend: Create influencer form has fields for Name, Email, Commission rate (defaults to 20%)
Frontend: Influencer dashboard shows 'Vous n'êtes pas un influenceur' error with lock icon for non-influencer users
seed_data_creation: Test influencers created during pytest: 'Test Influencer API' and 'Default Commission Test'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate system fully working. Existing CryptoKing influencer (code: cryptokiknl4, 25% commission) has 2 clicks. No mocked APIs - all affiliate endpoints use real MongoDB collections (influencers, conversions, payouts). Stripe Connect endpoints require real Stripe account setup for full payout flow testing.

POST /api/influencers.notes: Creates influencer with auto-generated affiliate code, supports custom commission_rate

GET /api/admin/influencers.notes: Returns all influencers with computed stats (clicks, conversions, commission totals)

POST /api/affiliate/click.notes: Public endpoint, increments click count for active influencer codes

GET /api/influencer/stats.notes: Returns 404 for non-influencer users, stats for linked influencers

GET /api/admin/conversions.notes: Lists all conversions with influencer_id, commission, status

elements_verified: Tab visible in admin panel tab bar
Summary stats: 3 Influencers, 0 Conversions, $0.00 Total commissions
Influencer cards with name, email, code, clicks, conv, commission rate

vip_ref_capture.notes: VIP page /vip?ref=cryptokiknl4 stores ref code in localStorage.affiliate_ref

influencer_dashboard.notes: Shows lock icon + 'Vous n'êtes pas un influenceur' error for non-influencer users

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKED APIs - The affiliate system uses real MongoDB collections. Stripe Connect/payout endpoints require real Stripe Connected accounts.
